svg.style: background-color: #ffffff; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;

g.text: "An extensible architecture for publisher-owned semantic interoperability."
One source. Projected for every experience.
OpenGEO defines the architecture, not the implementation.
Existing and future technologies naturally fit into the DSCE (Discovery · Semantic · Context · Execution) ecosystem.
Marks the recommended reference path for adopting DSCE.
